arts.ttl: West Ham lead Man United and Tottenham in the race to sign 24-year-old English star
arts.sum: Premier League clubs West Ham, Manchester United and Tottenham are all looking for a new midfielder in the summer transfer window. A player that is catching the eye of most Premier League clubs is Lille midfielder Angel Gomes who is set to become a free agent at the end of the season. He will be […] The post West Ham lead Man United and Tottenham in the race to sign 24-year-old English star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive huge injury boost before Man United as 23-year-old 'makes unexpected return' to matchday squad
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly receive a huge and unexpected injury boost before their Premier League showdown with Manchester United, as Gabriel Martinelli is part of the squad.

arts.ttl: Asking price revealed: Arsenal keen on signing Liverpool’s Mo Salah replacement
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are keen on signing Kingsley Coman from Bayern Munich at the end of the season. According to a report from Fichajes, Arsenal and Liverpool are the main candidates to sign the 28-year-old French international who is expected to be on the move this summer. The report further claims that he will cost […] The post Asking price revealed: Arsenal keen on signing Liverpool’s Mo Salah replacement appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Confirmed Manchester United squad members vs Arsenal as youngster could make full debut
arts.sum: Man United's squad members started to arrive at Old Trafford shortly after 12.30pm for their Premier League clash with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Berta agrees to be Arsenal sporting director
arts.sum: Andrea Berta has chosen to become the new sporting director of Arsenal amid interest from Manchester United, Paris Saint-Germain and other top clubs - but the chance to work at Arsenal and in the Premier League proved too good an opportunity to turn down.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea 'face competition' for Ferran Torres as La Liga club 'prepares £17m bid'
arts.sum: Villarreal are allegedly determined to sign Barcelona attacker Ferran Torres during this summer's transfer window, with an offer of £17m potentially being made.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag Man United plan emerges after sacking as 10-year admission made - 'That was his vision'
arts.sum: Former Manchester United coach Benni McCarthy has opened up on working under Erik ten Hag at Old Trafford before leaving last summer.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag 'wanted to stay at Man Utd for 10 years' as Old Trafford plan revealed
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag was sacked as Manchester United boss in October and one of his former coaches has revealed the Dutchman was planning to remain at Old Trafford "for the next 10 years"

arts.ttl: Manchester City challenging Arsenal for €25m La Liga star
arts.sum: The La Liga market is one that Premier League have increasingly looked to in recent years, and the expectation is that this will continue in 2025 for the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Gary Neville plays bass guitar in surprise appearance live on stage at Manchester gig just hours before Man United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Just hours before the Sky Sports pundit was due at Old Trafford to provide coverage of Manchester United vs Arsenal. the 50-year-old was seen bouncing around while strumming a bass guitar.
